task_completion.description: Open the Avare aviation GPS app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare app interface (map, search, or menu) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Search for or locate the OAK identifier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains 'OAK' or the map is centered/zoomed on the OAK waypoint.

task_completion.description: Select the VOR/DME navaid rather than the KOAK airport.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OAK VOR/DME navaid is selected or highlighted in the search results or map, explicitly distinct from the KOAK airport entry.

task_completion.description: View the frequency details for the OAK VOR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The frequency '116.8' or '116.80' is visible in the Avare app's information panel or details screen for the OAK VOR.

task_completion.description: Record the frequency to the specified text file in the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor shows the creation or editing of '/data/local/tmp/vor_frequency.txt' containing the exact text 'OAK VOR: 116.8 MHz' (or 116.80 MHz).

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Avare app to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the Avare app's GUI to retrieve the frequency, not a web browser or terminal search.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the app to directly write the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the agent navigating the Avare app before the terminal command writing the output file appears.

integrity.description: The agent verified the VOR/DME specifically, not the airport.
integrity.visual_evidence: The app screens should show the VOR/DME symbol or text being accessed, proving the agent didn't just guess the frequency or pull it from the airport page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Oakland VOR/DME (Identifier: OAK) has an official frequency of 116.8 MHz (or 116.80 MHz). The target output file is /data/local/tmp/vor_frequency.txt and the expected format is 'OAK VOR: <frequency> MHz' (e.g., 'OAK VOR: 116.8 MHz').
